workspaces.title: agentExecutor context setter
acceptanceCriteria: WorkspaceAgentExecutor has setPlanExecutionId(id: string): void
updateAgentExecutorContext calls setter, not constructor
Zero as-any casts remain in autonomous-executor.ts
TypeScript compiles cleanly

workspaces.title: currentPlanState cache guard
acceptanceCriteria: AsyncMutex or equivalent guards cache read/write in executeWorkspace
Mutex released on throw
No deadlock under 3 concurrent executeWorkspace calls
TypeScript compiles cleanly
workspaces.targetCommand: npm run typecheck && npm test -- autonomous-executor

workspaces.title: Pause race fix + deadlock guard
acceptanceCriteria: Control check fires at top of while loop before getNextWorkspaces
Paused status enters 500ms poll-wait loop
Deadlock check gated on exec.status === running
Stop while paused exits cleanly
Resume within 1 poll interval

workspaces.title: Recovery meta file
acceptanceCriteria: planExecId.meta.json written at plan start with planFile, title, phase, startedAt
recoverSingleExecution reads meta file before falling back to newest .md
Meta file deleted on terminal state
Two sequential plans recover to their own plan files

workspaces.title: Log batching
acceptanceCriteria: logContent accumulation string removed
saveExecutionLog called at most every 50 lines or 5 seconds
Flush forced on every terminal state transition
Batch timer cleared on function return
Log file on disk remains append-only and complete

workspaces.title: Queue snapshot cleanup
acceptanceCriteria: workspace-queue.json deleted on completePlan, failPlan, stop, cancel
meta.json deleted alongside queue snapshot
Deletion is best-effort — warning logged on failure, no throw
No snapshot files remain after clean completion
In-flight crash still recovers correctly

workspaces.title: Duplicate run guard
acceptanceCriteria: inFlightProjects Set guards concurrent runPlan calls per projectId
Second simultaneous call returns success:false with clear error
Guard released on initialize() success or failure
Sequential runs for same project work normally
Existing running execution returns existing planExecId instead of starting new

workspaces.title: App.tsx control button state + hook fixes
acceptanceCriteria: canResume, canPause, canStop derived from activePlanStatus
All buttons disabled when selectedPlanExecId is null
LabeledBtn accepts and applies disabled prop
Legacy hooks suspended with enabled: !hasProjects
allCommandLines wrapped in useMemo
TypeScript compiles cleanly
